AccessControlSettings.description: Mutable access behavior and secret-free deployment readiness flags.
AccessControlSettings.title: AccessControlSettings

ActivityEvent.description: Immutable evidence entering the product from any supported source.
ActivityEvent.title: ActivityEvent

ActivityKind.description: Normalized user activities accepted by the vNext profile pipeline.
ActivityKind.title: ActivityKind

BrowserBootstrapRequest.title: BrowserBootstrapRequest

ChatChunk.description: Transport-neutral chunk that can be rendered as an SSE event.
ChatChunk.title: ChatChunk

ChatDoneEvent.title: ChatDoneEvent

ChatHistoryPage.description: Stable bounded page of public turns for one conversation.
ChatHistoryPage.title: ChatHistoryPage

ChatHistoryTurn.title: ChatHistoryTurn

ChatRole.description: Roles persisted in a chat conversation.
ChatRole.title: ChatRole

ClaimedSourceTask.description: One durable task leased to exactly one extension worker.
ClaimedSourceTask.title: ClaimedSourceTask

CollectionItem.description: A local collection membership for one normalized content item.
CollectionItem.title: CollectionItem

ContentItem.title: ContentItem

ErrorDetail.description: Stable machine code and safe human-readable summary.
ErrorDetail.title: ErrorDetail

ErrorEnvelope.description: The only JSON error shape exposed by the v1 HTTP boundary.
ErrorEnvelope.title: ErrorEnvelope

EventIngestResponse.description: Accepted event identity and the normalized profile signals it produced.
EventIngestResponse.title: EventIngestResponse

FeedEntry.description: One admitted candidate in the user's ordered feed.
FeedEntry.title: FeedEntry

FeedItem.description: One feed entry joined to its normalized display content.
FeedItem.title: FeedItem

FeedSettings.description: Bounded collection and admission policy used by FeedService.
FeedSettings.title: FeedSettings

Interaction.description: An immutable user interaction with a normalized content item.
Interaction.title: Interaction

InteractionKind.description: User actions that can affect ranking or local collections.
InteractionKind.title: InteractionKind

InteractionResponse.description: Persisted interaction and its deterministic profile signal.
InteractionResponse.title: InteractionResponse

JobPriorityLane.description: Closed user-facing names for the three queue priorities.
JobPriorityLane.title: JobPriorityLane

JobSettings.description: Mutable cleanup retention and deployment-owned worker concurrency.
JobSettings.title: JobSettings

LibraryItem.description: One local collection membership joined to renderable normalized content.
LibraryItem.title: LibraryItem

LoggingSettings.description: Runtime log thresholds plus the deployment-owned output location.
LoggingSettings.title: LoggingSettings

NetworkSettings.description: Secret-free outbound routing policy for supported overseas clients.
NetworkSettings.title: NetworkSettings

OnboardingProgressEvent.description: Current persisted stage and its concrete child job run.
OnboardingProgressEvent.title: OnboardingProgressEvent

OnboardingTerminalEvent.description: Terminal state propagated from the current durable onboarding child.
OnboardingTerminalEvent.title: OnboardingTerminalEvent

ProfileEdit.description: An explicit, optimistic edit that creates exactly one profile revision.
ProfileEdit.title: ProfileEdit

ProfileFacet.description: One evidence-backed value in the user-controlled profile.
ProfileFacet.title: ProfileFacet

ProfileFacetEdit.description: One explicit user-authored facet override without client-supplied evidence.
ProfileFacetEdit.title: ProfileFacetEdit

ProfileFacetReference.description: A typed case-insensitive facet identity to remove.
ProfileFacetReference.title: ProfileFacetReference

ProfileSettings.description: Evidence admission threshold for scheduled profile projection.
ProfileSettings.title: ProfileSettings

ProfileSignal.description: A profile observation that always identifies its supporting evidence.
ProfileSignal.title: ProfileSignal

ProfileSnapshot.description: An immutable revision of the evidence profile.
ProfileSnapshot.title: ProfileSnapshot

SourceAccountDisconnectResult.title: SourceAccountDisconnectResult

SourceAccountStatus.title: SourceAccountStatus

SourceCapability.description: Stable product capabilities, independent of a provider's operation names.
SourceCapability.title: SourceCapability

SourceCredentialInput.description: Write-only browser credential accepted by every retained source account form.
SourceCredentialInput.title: SourceCredentialInput

SourceId.description: Closed canonical identity set retained by the vNext product.
SourceId.title: SourceId

SourceManifest.description: Immutable source identity with separate capability and operation declarations.
SourceManifest.title: SourceManifest

SourceOperation.description: Concrete read-only operations executable by source connectors.
SourceOperation.title: SourceOperation

SourceOperationSpec.description: Execution metadata for one concrete operation.
SourceOperationSpec.title: SourceOperationSpec

SourceSettings.description: Built-in source admission and relative collection allocation.
SourceSettings.title: SourceSettings

SourceSettingsState.description: Safe persisted settings for one explicit built-in source.
SourceSettingsState.title: SourceSettingsState

TaskSettings.description: Product-level semantic task alias and bounded execution limits.
TaskSettings.title: TaskSettings

UserSettings.description: Complete secret-free product settings persisted in the application database.
UserSettings.title: UserSettings

UserSettingsPatch.description: Strict recursive partial update; deployment-owned fields are intentionally absent.
UserSettingsPatch.title: UserSettingsPatch

patch.description: Apply one explicit user-authored optimistic profile revision.

delete.description: Idempotently delete one source account's encrypted credential material.
